scripts.build: npm run build -w @llm-table/shared && npm run build -w @llm-table/conversation && npm run build -w @llm-table/poker && npm run build -w @llm-table/rpg && npm run build -w @llm-table/server && npm run build -w @llm-table/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @llm-table/shared && npm run typecheck -w @llm-table/conversation && npm run typecheck -w @llm-table/poker && npm run typecheck -w @llm-table/rpg && npm run typecheck -w @llm-table/server && npm run typecheck -w @llm-table/web
